meaning: 列城[南亚克什米尔东部城镇]
examples: Half way through the second week at the school, we were able to leave and go back to Leh.
But the next day, fears that venerable investment bank Lehman Brothers ( LEH) might go under dragged the S&P 500 down 3.4%.
The high-altitude desert of Leh in northern India falls in the rain shadow of the Himalayas, receiving as little precipitation as the Sahara.
Lehman Brothers (nyse: LEH - news - people ) more than doubled.
They hired jet skis and rode glass-bottom boats to see bird-nesting sites at Phi Phi Leh.
